name: Lab Rats: Elite Force
overview: In a bustling metropolis after the Mighty Med hospital is destroyed by a band of unknown super-villains, Adam and Leo volunteer to oversee the students at Davenport's Bionic Academy. Kaz, Oliver and Skylar join forces with Chase and Bree to form a powerful elite force that combines bionic heroes and superheroes. Together, they vow to track down the villains and keep the world safe.
